title: Step 1 of 3: Replace getOpenOrders with pending in tradingLoop order fetching

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, locate only the first occurrence where getOpenOrders is called on the ICDex actor inside the tradingLoop function. Replace that single call with the correct 'pending' method. Do not change any other part of the file. Preserve all surrounding logic, variable names, and structure exactly as-is.

quotes: Divida a troca do getOpenOrders por pending, em 2 ou 3 etapas... nao tente trocar todo o codigo de uma vez.

acceptanceCriteria: The first getOpenOrders call inside tradingLoop is replaced with pending
No other lines in main.mo are modified
The Motoko file compiles without errors
The rest of the bot logic (order placement, cancellation, logging) remains unchanged

constraints: Only modify the single first occurrence of getOpenOrders inside tradingLoop — do not touch any other code
Do not refactor, reformat, or restructure any other part of main.mo
Do not modify any frontend files
nonGoals: Replacing all remaining getOpenOrders occurrences (reserved for steps 2 and 3)
Any other bug fixes or feature additions
Modifying the ICDex actor interface or type definitions beyond what is strictly required for this single call
